text:
Once upon a time, in a garden filled with vibrant flowers, lived a humble bee. Every day, this bee visited the orchids seeking nectar for their honey. The flowers would sway gently, trying to entice him with their sweet scent. One sunflower especially mesmerized the bee; its hues were like gold.

Far away from this sweet garden, in the kingdom of Farland, there lived a sorcerer. He coveted the unique golden pollen that the orchids harvested each season. Using magical herbs that only bloomed during a once-a-century storm, he endeavored to replicate this enchantment. Unfortunately for these orchids and our brave little bee, the storm never came. But one particular autumn morning, the world seemed unsettled. A thin veil of fog crept across the land.

The bee buzzed towards the haze, determined. It clacked its pollen basket together, braving the chill. Little did it know that this was no ordinary fog. It was haunted by shadows
